name: UXLens Design System
description: Complete design system extracted from UXLens — AI-powered UX audit SaaS platform. Includes all tokens, components, patterns, screens, and audit findings for Figma Design System Extractor.

meta.styling: Tailwind CSS 4 + CSS variables + oklch color space

usedIn: all components via Tailwind body class

button.accessibilityNotes: Uses @base-ui ButtonPrimitive for accessible button semantics. Supports focus-visible ring, disabled state, aria-expanded, aria-invalid.

badge.accessibilityNotes: Uses @base-ui utilities. Consumer is responsible for semantic meaning (role, aria-label).

input.accessibilityNotes: Uses @base-ui InputPrimitive. Supports focus-visible ring, disabled state, aria-invalid. Consumer responsible for aria-label, aria-describedby.

card.accessibilityNotes: Layout-only component with no specific a11y features. Consumer responsible for semantics.

header.motionDetails: Grid collapse/expand (500ms cubic-bezier) on beta banner, opacity fade (400ms), blink-dot animation (1.8s infinite)
header.accessibilityNotes: Good: aria-label='Main navigation' on nav, aria-label='UXLens — Home' on logo link. Missing: aria-current on active nav items.

url-form.motionDetails: Focus glow (ultra-soft 600px box-shadow), caret blink (1s step-end infinite), button hover translateY(-1px), active scale(0.98), mouse glow on hover
url-form.accessibilityNotes: Has proper form element with onSubmit. Missing: aria-invalid, aria-describedby for error messaging. Has disabled state on button during loading.

loading-state.motionDetails: blink-dot (1.8s infinite), pdot animation (1.2s ease-in-out infinite, staggered 0/150/300ms), opacity transitions (300ms)
loading-state.accessibilityNotes: Missing: role='progressbar', aria-live='polite', aria-valuenow/valuemax. No prefers-reduced-motion handling.

error-state.accessibilityNotes: Missing: role='alert' on container. Has semantic h2 and descriptive error message.

pricing-cards.accessibilityNotes: Has clear visual hierarchy with check icons for feature lists.

chat-widget.motionDetails: FAB hover scale(1.05), active scale(0.95), smooth scrollIntoView for new messages, 200ms transition-all
chat-widget.accessibilityNotes: Has Enter/Shift+Enter keyboard handling. Missing: aria-label on FAB, aria-expanded on toggle, aria-live='polite' on message stream, focus trap on panel.

competitor-section.motionDetails: Score bar transition-all 500ms, ChevronDown rotation 200ms on expand, hover bg transition
competitor-section.accessibilityNotes: Missing: aria-expanded on expandable cards. Has clear text hierarchy.

heatmap-overlay.motionDetails: Canvas opacity transition 0.3s ease for toggle, animate-spin on loading spinner
heatmap-overlay.accessibilityNotes: Has alt='Page screenshot' on image. Canvas is pointer-events-none (correct for overlay). Missing: aria-label on toggle button.

pdf-export-button.accessibilityNotes: Missing: aria-label on button, aria-busy during generation.

scroll-reveal.motionDetails: revealUp keyframes 700ms with blur fade (0-2px), translate3d(0,32px,0) → none, will-change: opacity,transform
scroll-reveal.accessibilityNotes: Excellent: Respects prefers-reduced-motion:reduce — sets opacity:1, transform:none, filter:none, transition:none.

install-banner.motionDetails: install-slide-up keyframe (0.4s ease-out), exit translateY(120%) with 300ms transition, backdrop-blur-sm on iOS guide
install-banner.accessibilityNotes: Has aria-label='Dismiss install banner'. Missing: role='dialog' on iOS guide, aria-modal='true', focus trap on overlay.

results-report.motionDetails: Uses ScrollReveal wrappers for section entry animations, individual transition-all for hover/state changes on cards
results-report.accessibilityNotes: Has semantic h1/h2/h3 hierarchy. Missing: role='region' on major sections, aria-expanded on expandable sections, aria-label on icon-only buttons. Large complex component with many sub-sections.

landing-mocks.motionDetails: ScrollReveal wrappers, animate-ring-fill on score gauges (1.2s cubic-bezier, 300ms delay)
landing-mocks.accessibilityNotes: Missing: role='img'/aria-label on mock cards, aria-hidden on decorative elements.

limit-reached.accessibilityNotes: Has form validation with error messaging. Missing: aria-invalid, aria-describedby.

human-audit-form.accessibilityNotes: Has input placeholders and email validation. Missing: aria-invalid, aria-describedby, aria-label on inputs.

human-audit-confirmation.accessibilityNotes: Has semantic h2 and CheckCircle2 success icon. Missing: role='status' or role='alert'.

footer.motionDetails: animate-fade-in on counter (400ms), AnimatedNumber RAF count-up (1200ms cubic-bezier easing)
footer.accessibilityNotes: Has aria-label='Footer navigation' on nav. Good semantic nav structure.

hero.motionDetails: RotatingText cycles words every 2.8s with 500ms slide+blur animations, animate-fade-in on badges (250ms delay), animate-slide-up on h1/p/form (staggered 60ms/120ms)
hero.accessibilityNotes: Has semantic h1. Missing: prefers-reduced-motion handling on RotatingText, aria labels on animated badges.

hero-icons.motionDetails: Extensive SVG animations: heroSlideLeft/Right (13s infinite), heroFloat (6s/8s ease-in-out infinite), heroFade (13s infinite), heroPopSpark (13s infinite with complex scale/opacity). All use transform-origin and cubic-bezier.
hero-icons.accessibilityNotes: Excellent: Has aria-hidden='true' (correct for decorative SVG).

hero-section.description: Animated hero with three-card SVG illustration, rotating text headline, and browser-chrome URL form
hero-section.layoutCharacteristics: Centered column, max-width 780px, stagger-animated entry, Three.js background (lazy)

url-audit-form.description: Browser-chrome styled URL input with traffic light dots, blinking caret, and glow focus
url-audit-form.layoutCharacteristics: Full-width, rounded-[14px], browser-chrome header with 3 dots, inner text input + action bar

pricing-grid.description: 3-column pricing cards with feature checklists and current plan detection
pricing-grid.layoutCharacteristics: 3-column grid (gap-3), equal-height cards, popular card highlighted

diagnostic-pipeline.description: 10-step animated pipeline showing audit progress with blinking dots and step states
diagnostic-pipeline.layoutCharacteristics: Centered column, numbered steps with status indicators, staggered dot animations

error-retry.description: Centered error message with status dot and retry button
error-retry.layoutCharacteristics: Centered column with large vertical padding (py-32), max-width-sm text

sticky-header.description: Blurred sticky header with logo, nav links, auth controls, and collapsible beta banner
sticky-header.layoutCharacteristics: Fixed top, full-width, h-14, backdrop-blur, z-50

install-pwa.description: Floating bottom-center banner for mobile PWA install with Android native prompt / iOS share instructions
install-pwa.layoutCharacteristics: Fixed bottom-center, w-360px max, rounded-2xl, slide-up animation

audit-report.description: Full audit dashboard with score gauge, categories, findings, rewrites, heuristics, visual analysis, and competitor benchmarking
audit-report.layoutCharacteristics: Max-width 960px centered, sectioned layout with ScrollReveal, DashSection containers

chat-interface.description: Floating AI chat FAB + panel with suggestion chips, streaming messages, credits counter

competitor-benchmark.description: Score comparison with expandable competitor cards and category-by-category breakdown
competitor-benchmark.layoutCharacteristics: Full-width section with accordion cards, score bars, comparison grid

limit-paywall.description: Usage exhausted state with usage bar, pricing cards, human audit CTA, and subscription verification
limit-paywall.layoutCharacteristics: Centered column, usage progress bar, embedded pricing grid, form sections

feature-showcase.description: FeatureSection layout with marketing copy + animated mock component for landing page SEO content
feature-showcase.layoutCharacteristics: Alternating left/right layout, ScrollReveal on each section, mock cards with ring-fill animation

before-after-rewrite.description: Side-by-side before/after hero rewrite with original → improved copy comparison
before-after-rewrite.layoutCharacteristics: Two-column comparison, original faded with improved highlighted

screens.name: Home / Landing
screens.purpose: Primary landing page and audit tool. Users enter a URL, see loading pipeline, then full audit results. Also contains below-fold SEO content with feature showcases.

screens.name: Dashboard
screens.purpose: Authenticated user dashboard showing audit history, plan info, usage metrics, and API key management.

screens.name: Audit Detail
screens.purpose: Displays a saved/archived audit report. Full audit results with heatmap, heuristics, competitor analysis.

screens.name: Pricing
screens.purpose: Displays pricing tiers (Free/Starter/Pro/Agency) with feature comparison and LemonSqueezy checkout integration.

unusedTokens.reason: Defined but never referenced in any component. Likely shadcn/ui default.
Defined but never referenced in any component.
Defined but never directly referenced via var(). May be accessed via Tailwind's text-card-foreground.
Defined but no popover component uses it directly.
Defined but no popover component uses it directly.

6 sidebar tokens defined (sidebar, sidebar-foreground, sidebar-accent, sidebar-accent-foreground, sidebar-primary, sidebar-primary-foreground, sidebar-border, sidebar-ring) but no sidebar component exists.
5 chart tokens defined but never referenced. Likely shadcn/ui defaults.
Full 11-step brand palette defined but never referenced. Only --brand (equivalent to brand-900) is used.

unusedComponents.reason: Exported but never imported anywhere in the codebase. The form functionality is inlined in limit-reached.tsx instead.

inconsistencies.description: prefers-reduced-motion is only respected in scroll-reveal.tsx. All other animated components (hero.tsx, loading-state.tsx, hero-icons.tsx, install-banner.tsx, url-form.tsx) ignore the user's motion preference.
Form components (url-form.tsx, human-audit-form.tsx) lack aria-invalid and aria-describedby for error states. Loading-state.tsx lacks role='progressbar'. Error-state.tsx lacks role='alert'.
install-banner.tsx iOS guide overlay and chat-widget.tsx panel lack focus traps. Focus can escape to background content.
hero-icons.tsx uses hardcoded hex colors (#EAE8F4, #DCA854, etc.) instead of CSS variables. These are not part of the token system.
results-report.tsx and other components use inline oklch() values (e.g., 'oklch(0.55 0.17 20 / 8%)') instead of referencing CSS variables. These are semantic colors that should be tokenized.
The focus-glow pattern (box-shadow with 600px blur) is defined in globals.css as .focus-glow class but also manually replicated inline in url-form.tsx button hover states.

recommendations.action: Add prefers-reduced-motion handling to all animated components, especially hero.tsx RotatingText, loading-state.tsx pipeline dots, and hero-icons.tsx SVG animations.
Add missing ARIA attributes: role='progressbar' + aria-valuenow on loading-state, role='alert' on error-state, aria-expanded on all accordion/expandable sections, aria-label on all icon-only buttons.
Remove or consolidate unused tokens: all 8 sidebar-* tokens, all 5 chart-* tokens, --accent/--accent-foreground, --popover/--popover-foreground. These add noise to the design system.
Tokenize the full brand palette (brand-900 through brand-25) if it will be used, or remove it from globals.css if only --brand is needed.
Add focus traps to modal/overlay components: install-banner iOS guide and chat-widget panel.
Move hardcoded colors in hero-icons.tsx to CSS variables for consistency.
Extract inline oklch values in results-report.tsx into named CSS variables (e.g., --severity-critical-accent, --category-bg-hover).
Remove human-audit-form.tsx if its functionality is fully covered by the inline form in limit-reached.tsx.

icon.description: App icon — fan rotor on #EAE8F4 rounded rect

logo-full.description: Full UXLens logo — fan rotor icon + 'UXLens' wordmark, viewBox 0 0 2141 617, #4C2CFF icon + currentColor text
